tagline: Turn fleeting feelings into visual ideas.

designSystem.fontFamily: Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Serif Display
designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphism with deep indigo-black base, gradient blobs, soft glow shadows, and organic-meets-geometric aesthetic. Typography pairs a modern geometric sans (Plus Jakarta Sans) with an italic editorial serif (DM Serif Display) for expressive direction names.

screens: Capture — Multi-modal input (text, voice, photo) with suggested prompts and generate button
Board — Visual mood board with gradient blob visualization, color palette, mood words, textures, form language, and pinnable elements
Gallery — Saved boards grid with color strip previews, mood tags, and direction labels
Export — Format picker (Mood Pack, PNG, Palette, PDF) with board preview and share shortcuts
